title: Add automatic handoff backfill scheduling
summary: Added automatic backfill on OpenCode startup and every 10 minutes, while keeping the manual /handoff-backfill command available.
goal: Make persisted handoff context appear automatically without requiring users to run backfill manually in every repo.
changesMade: Added automatic startup backfill in the handoff service

features.name: automatic startup backfill
features.why: Seed .handoffs immediately when OpenCode opens so get_context can return useful context without manual setup.

features.name: recurring 10 minute backfill
features.why: Refresh imported session history during long-lived OpenCode sessions without requiring a manual command.

features.name: scheduler coverage
features.why: Verify startup scheduling, 10 minute interval behavior, and manual backfill compatibility.

decisions.why: Users still need an explicit recovery path and a direct way to force imports on demand.

decisions.decision: Run background backfill inside the service layer
decisions.why: The same code path can serve startup, interval, and manual triggers while centralizing overlap protection and logging.

openQuestions: Should automatic backfill write a visible toast or stay silent unless it fails?
resumePrompt: Continue from the automatic backfill work. Inspect src/handoffs/service.ts and tests/handoffs.test.ts first. Preserve manual /handoff-backfill support while extending background context behavior.
